title: ctenopteris discolor
intro: Ctenopteris discolor, also known as the New Zealand fern or native fern, is a species of flowering plant in the nettle family Urticaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris discolor are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Ctenopteris discolor are typically made from the leaves and can be consumed as a tea or used topically in the form of creams or ointments.
